name: Vera the Vernusylph Goddess
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>春</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヴェーラ
name_jp_tl: Vera the Goddess of the Vernalizer Fairies
desc: Once per turn, when a monster effect activated by your opponent resolves, if you control 5 or more EARTH monsters, you can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Vera the Vernusylph Goddess" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of it, and if you do, it becomes EARTH. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 EARTH monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, when a monster effect activated by your opponent resolves, if you control 5 or more EARTH monsters, you can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Vera the Vernusylph Goddess" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of it, and if you do, it becomes EARTH. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 EARTH monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
eff: Once per turn, when a monster effect activated by your opponent resolves, if you control 5 or more EARTH monsters, you can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Vera the Vernusylph Goddess" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of it, and if you do, it becomes EARTH. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 EARTH monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
